title: Job Description Decomposition and Evidence Mapping · Cumulative Campaign Review
summary: A delayed hiring review reconstructs job description decomposition and evidence mapping from target, claim, evidence, audience, action, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, consent, owner, and next-decision evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for role requirement and evidence matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Extract the problems, users, decisions, deliverables, collaboration, quality, and operating outcomes beneath requirement wording.
Classify stated requirements as essential evidence, likely preference, negotiable proxy, process constraint, or unresolved question.
Map each priority outcome to direct, adjacent, transferable, missing, or contradictory candidate evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Outcome Extraction · changed case · Review Outcome Extraction
steps.instruction:
review case — A listing mixes essential outcomes, preferences, recruiter keywords, copied requirements, legal text, and unknown team constraints behind a familiar title. The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Extract the problems, users, decisions, deliverables, collaboration, quality, and operating outcomes beneath requirement wording.

Which action demonstrates Outcome Extraction without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Outcome Extraction · changed case · Review Outcome Extraction.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for extract the problems, users, decisions, deliverables, collaboration, quality, and operating outcomes beneath requirement wording. For Outcome Extraction · changed case · Review Outcome Extraction, keep Outcome Extraction connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A listing mixes essential outcomes, preferences, recruiter keywords, copied requirements, legal text, and unknown team constraints behind a familiar title. The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Extract the problems, users, decisions, deliverables, collaboration, quality, and operating outcomes beneath requirement wording.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Outcome Extraction condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub Resume and Project Presentation Tutorial — Controls selective project presentation, useful repository descriptions, setup, demonstration, tests, dependency currency, and truthful links from application evidence.

hints: For Outcome Extraction · changed case · Review Outcome Extraction, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Outcome Extraction precondition, or invariant that must hold.

The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. For Outcome Extraction · changed case · Review Outcome Extraction, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Matching nouns matters more than understanding expected work.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Outcome Extraction

stimulus.title: Go No Go case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A listing mixes essential outcomes, preferences, recruiter keywords, copied requirements, legal text, and unknown team constraints behind a familiar title. lines.label: risk
lines.text: Applying has no cost, so every listing deserves a submission.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Make and document a bounded apply, investigate, defer, or decline decision from fit, cost, risk, evidence, and learner priorities. Artifact under review: role requirement and evidence matrix.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Go No Go, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim fails the evidence boundary for Go No Go.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Go No Go

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Make and document a bounded apply, investigate, defer, or decline decision from fit, cost, risk, evidence, and learner priorities.
